data.title: RED tests: preconditions-depth-classifier.sh tier mapping, round-trip, and unknown schema_version
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context
Story 86ad-f5e7. Write failing tests BEFORE implementing preconditions-depth-classifier.sh. Tests must be RED (fail) when this task is committed because the source file does not exist yet.

## Test Approach (Given / When / Then)

### Test 1: Classifier maps TRIVIAL → minimal (schema_version=1)
- Given: classification="TRIVIAL" input
- When: _classify_manifest_depth "TRIVIAL" is invoked
- Then: outputs manifest_depth="minimal" and schema_version=1

### Test 2: Classifier maps MODERATE → standard (schema_version=2)
- Given: classification="MODERATE" input
- When: _classify_manifest_depth "MODERATE" is invoked
- Then: outputs manifest_depth="standard" and schema_version=2

### Test 3: Classifier maps COMPLEX → deep (schema_version=2)
- Given: classification="COMPLEX" input
- When: _classify_manifest_depth "COMPLEX" is invoked
- Then: outputs manifest_depth="deep" and schema_version=2

### Test 4: Classifier handles SIMPLE (epic-tier alias for TRIVIAL)
- Given: classification="SIMPLE" input
- When: _classify_manifest_depth "SIMPLE" is invoked
- Then: outputs manifest_depth="minimal" and schema_version=1

### Test 5: Unknown classification → fail-open as minimal
- Given: classification="UNKNOWN_VALUE" input
- When: _classify_manifest_depth "UNKNOWN_VALUE" is invoked
- Then: outputs manifest_depth="minimal" and schema_version=1 (spike FP fallback)

### Test 6: Standard tier field-set includes extended_gate_verdicts and derived_invariants
- Given: a PRECONDITIONS event written with depth="standard"
- When: the event JSON is read back
- Then: the event includes schema_version=2, manifest_depth="standard", and the standard-tier field keys are present

### Test 7: Deep tier field-set includes full_trace and dependency_chain
- Given: a PRECONDITIONS event written with depth="deep"
- When: the event JSON is read back
- Then: schema_version=2, manifest_depth="deep", full_trace[] and dependency_chain[] keys present

### Test 8: Round-trip test — minimal event
- Given: _write_preconditions called with depth="minimal"
- When: _read_latest_preconditions reads it back
- Then: schema_version=1, manifest_depth="minimal", known minimal-tier fields intact

## Implementation

Create: `tests/scripts/test-preconditions-depth-classifier.sh`

File naming compatibility check:
- Source file: `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-depth-classifier.sh`
- Normalized source basename: `preconditionsdepthclassifiersh`
- Proposed test: `test-preconditions-depth-classifier.sh`
- Normalized test basename: `testpreconditionsdepthclassifiersh`
- Fuzzy match: `preconditionsdepthclassifiersh` is substring of `testpreconditionsdepthclassifiersh` — PASS

Update `.test-index` with RED marker for the classifier source file BEFORE committing:
```
plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-depth-classifier.sh: tests/scripts/test-preconditions-depth-classifier.sh [test_classify_trivial_maps_minimal]
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Test file `tests/scripts/test-preconditions-depth-classifier.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-preconditions-depth-classifier.sh
- [ ] Test file contains ≥ 8 test functions covering classifier + round-trip cases
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-preconditions-depth-classifier.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] Tests FAIL (RED) when preconditions-depth-classifier.sh does not exist
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-preconditions-depth-classifier.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED"
- [ ] `.test-index` updated with RED marker for preconditions-depth-classifier.sh
  Verify: grep '\[test_classify_trivial_maps_minimal\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Tests follow behavioral-testing-standard.md (Given/When/Then, observable outputs, no source-file-grepping assertions)
  Verify: manual review — tests invoke classifier and assert on stdout/exit code, not on file content

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
